assertions.description: row0-row3 and col0-col6 nets correctly enumerated. 28 diodes on matrix correctly counted. Detection method 'net_name' is appropriate for this design.
BOM quantities match the schematic source. The 28 key switches and 28 diodes align with the 4x7 matrix. Connector counts are reasonable.

R2 is correctly identified as the SCL pull-up at 4.7kΩ to VCC. The sdaPM net lacking a pull-up is also correctly noted (it routes through SJ1 solder jumper to 'sda' which has its own pull-up on the expander side).
The schematic has nets named SCK, MOSI, MISO routed from U1 to the ICSP header J4 (Conn_01x06). The bus_analysis SPI list is empty. These are clearly SPI/ICSP signals by name and should be detected.
